exclusionPolicy: docs/codex/audits/** task reports unless explicitly promoted by a current source
local/generated evidence such as .codex/**, .claude/reviews/**, artifacts/**, screenshots/**, and test-results/**
AI-governance mirrors such as CLAUDE.md and .github/copilot-instructions.md when AGENTS.md is available
language duplicates and broad translated guides unless generating a language-specific manual

sections.title: Start Here: Authority And Operating Posture
sections.updateTrigger: AI governance, source authority, archive policy, or generated-artifact policy changes.
sections.validation: Docs/generator validation plus `python scripts/check_ai_assets.py` when AI governance assets change.

sections.title: Product Purpose And Current Deployment Boundary
sections.updateTrigger: Product positioning, deployment mode, private beta, no-advice, or launch verdict changes.
sections.validation: Docs-only validation for docs changes; release/UAT evidence for deployment posture changes.

sections.title: Architecture And Major Surfaces
sections.updateTrigger: Route map, API group, module ownership, dependency direction, or first-files debug flow changes.
sections.validation: Focused validation for touched surface; architecture docs-only validation for handbook-only changes.

sections.title: Auth, RBAC, And MFA
sections.updateTrigger: Any auth, session, capability, MFA, security evidence, admin route, or role-governance change.
sections.validation: Focused auth/RBAC tests, route-capability inventory, redaction checks, and wider gates when enforcement changes.

sections.title: Portfolio And Backtest
sections.updateTrigger: Portfolio accounting/read models, backtest execution/readback/export, public-safety, or owner-isolation changes.
sections.validation: Portfolio/backtest focused tests, golden fixtures, mutation guards, no-advice checks, and owner-isolation evidence when applicable.

sections.title: Provider, Quota, And Cost
sections.updateTrigger: Provider routing/fallback/freshness/cache, quota, circuit, budget, cost, or provider diagnostics changes.
sections.validation: Provider/cache/freshness tests, quota lifecycle tests, no-live-call proof when scoped, and redaction checks.

sections.title: WS2 And Durable Runtime
sections.updateTrigger: Analysis task queue, SSE, durable polling, worker, broker, multi-instance, or WS2 readiness changes.
sections.validation: Synthetic/local smoke first; staging/API A-B evidence and operator artifacts only when deployment posture changes.

sections.title: Options And Data Pipeline
sections.updateTrigger: Options providers, chain/Greeks, scenario copy, optional enrichment, data-quality, or no-advice changes.
sections.validation: Options/data-quality focused tests, fixture/mocked-provider tests, no-order scans, and redaction checks.

sections.title: Frontend IA And UI Conventions
sections.updateTrigger: Frontend route taxonomy, primitives, route IA, visual system, consumer/admin disclosure, or browser-evidence rules change.
sections.validation: Frontend focused tests plus lint/build/browser evidence when UI source or visual behavior changes.

sections.title: Validation Profiles And Task Workflow
sections.updateTrigger: Task modes, prompt fields, validation matrix, final report format, or frontend evidence rules change.
sections.validation: Run the task-required commands; docs-only changes use diff-check/status/secret scan unless task says otherwise.

sections.title: Public Launch NO-GO Blockers
sections.updateTrigger: Launch verdict, blocker register, release checklist, operator evidence contract, or launch acceptance process changes.
sections.validation: Docs-only validation for launch docs; release-grade gates and sanitized operator evidence for actual launch posture changes.

sections.title: Known Experimental And Demo-Only Surfaces
sections.updateTrigger: Any diagnostic/demo/fixture/dry-run surface becomes runtime, production, or user-visible decision authority.
sections.validation: Fail-closed tests, no-live-call proof, redaction checks, docs wording review, and task-specific runtime evidence.

sections.title: Source Inclusion And Exclusion Policy
sections.updateTrigger: Docs taxonomy, archive policy, generated artifact policy, or manual source curation changes.
sections.validation: Run this generator twice and prove deterministic output; run docs diff-check and secret scan.
